programs.title: Selling Mega Mansions
programs.desc: Marco and Allie tour the Pine Tree Rat Pack house with Tara West; Steve makes his last pitch to convince Allie to leave San Diego.

programs.title: Find Me a Luxury Home
programs.desc: Interested in entertaining, successful interior designer Cathy looks at three luxury homes in upscale Los Angeles neighborhoods.

programs.title: Dream Purchase
programs.desc: Dream Purchase follows the realization of an American dream; everyone has dreamed of owning that special thing; for some its a classic car, for others a luxury home and for some even a helicopter or luxury yacht.

programs.title: Private Islands
programs.desc: Amber Coco Plum, an adult-only resort in Belize, to learn about its history and to tour its secluded cabanas; Amber visits ancient Mayan ruins; Amber zips through the Belize rainforest.

programs.title: Distant Shores
programs.desc: Paul and Sheryl Shard are on a diverse voyage from England through the inland waterways of France to the Mediterranean Sea, an Atlantic crossing and island-hopping in the Caribbean aboard their 49-foot sailboat, Distant Shores II.

programs.title: Global Passport
programs.desc: Christina Cindrich visits the Amalfi Coast in Italy; this 25 mile-long stretch of postcard-perfect coastal towns have been a magnet for the jet-set and are easily one of the most beautiful regions in the whole world.
